refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time by optimizing load, travel, and dump phases to meet the customer-defined cycle time target.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing it into sub-FRs for each phase of the cycle (load, travel, dump) allows targeted design and verification of each phase's contribution to overall cycle time.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure p95 cycle time for each sub-phase under agreed duty cycle and site conditions, then aggregate to verify overall cycle time target.

candidate_dps: Optimize vehicle powertrain and hydraulics for load phase
Implement efficient route planning and navigation algorithms for travel phase
Automate dump mechanism control for dump phase
selected_dp.selected_dp: Optimize vehicle powertrain and hydraulics for load phase

potential_sources: Load phase optimization tightly coupled with travel and dump phases due to shared vehicle resources
Route planning algorithms depend on vehicle state from load phase
coupling_check.notes: Strong coupling exists between DPs for load, travel, and dump phases; requires careful interface definition and modularization.

assumptions_risks: Assuming vehicle powertrain can be optimized independently without degrading travel or dump performance
Risk that optimization in one phase may negatively impact others if not coordinated
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Refine DPs to explicitly address inter-phase coordination or consider integrated DP for cycle time optimization.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical components responsible for load, travel, and dump operations including powertrain and hydraulics

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle sends operational data to NGHE Solution and Safety Services

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives commands from Teleoperation and NGHE Solution for cycle execution

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Sends safety alerts to Safety Services

module_containment_scores.notes: Vehicle module contains majority of physical DP elements for cycle time phases; low diffusion risk.
NGHE Solution manages overall coordination but does not directly implement physical DP.
Teleoperation interfaces with Vehicle but does not contain DP for cycle time optimization.
Safety Services primarily handles safety alerts, minimal containment of cycle time DP.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Assigning cycle time optimization DP to Vehicle module centralizes physical control and minimizes diffusion.
containment_risks: Potential overlap with NGHE Solution for coordination logic
Risk of insufficient interface definition causing integration issues
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Clarify interface contracts between Vehicle and NGHE Solution to reduce integration risk.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Strong coupling between DPs for load, travel, and dump phases violates independence axiom; requires DP refinement.

diffusion_risks: Some diffusion risk between Vehicle and NGHE Solution modules due to coordination logic.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module is appropriate for physical DP containment; interfaces need tightening.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification feasible via telemetry and cycle time measurements at Vehicle and NGHE Solution boundaries.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of physical DP to Vehicle; coordination logic partially in NGHE Solution.

recommended_revisions: Refine DP to reduce coupling between cycle phases.
Define clearer interface contracts between Vehicle and NGHE Solution.
Consider splitting coordination DP into separate IM if diffusion risk increases.

decision.justification: DP coupling failure requires revisiting DP decomposition and possibly FR refinement to achieve independence and reduce integration risk.

revise.why: Current DP selection shows strong coupling violating design independence; need to refine or redefine DPs.

assumptions: Vehicle powertrain and hydraulics can be optimized independently
Interfaces between Vehicle and NGHE Solution can be clearly defined
open_risks: DP coupling may cause integration complexity
Potential diffusion of cycle time logic across modules
evidence_needed: Detailed interface definitions and data flow diagrams
Performance data for each cycle phase under proposed DP
